channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Illegal Parking on Double Yellow Lines, 13th May
item.description:
This same van has parked illegally multiple times this week. Bicycles cannot see cars travelling on Foxberry Road and it is extremely dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 102, Foxberry Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded hire bike, 13th May
item.description:
Our quiet residential street is now cluttered with a huge number of hire cycles blocking the pavement and restricting pedestrian footfall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7-12, Vanbrugh Fields, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Our quiet residential street is now cluttered with a huge number of hire cycles blocking the pavement and restricting pedestrian footfall.

item.title: Dog waste on edge of pavement of Weston Street, 13th May
item.description:
Dog waste has been there for a couple of days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Weston Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep puddle outside my house caused by recent pavement repair, 13th May
item.description:
The workers who recently repaired the pavement outside my house have left a big hollow. This causes a deep puddle to form when it rains. This is unacceptable and needs to be corrected as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Pleydell Avenue, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7-12, Vanbrugh Fields, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flutipping building rubble, 13th May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hassett Road, Hackney, London

item.description:
Our quiet residential street is now cluttered with a huge number of hire cycles blocking the pavement and restricting pedestrian footfall.

item.title: Graffiti still not removed - full length of dock wall, 13th May
item.description:
Full length of dock wall covered in extremely large graffiti. Looks terrible. Reported months ago, still not covered or removed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whinchat Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 13th May
item.description:
Please remove rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Spring Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Think a fridge or cabinet, 13th May
item.description:
It’s on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bacon Grove, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overgrowing and blocking pavement, 13th May
item.description:
This street tree is almost completely blocking the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4th time in a month. Resident flytipping, 13th May
item.description:
Picture says it all. Bin day was last Saturday and 4 days later this is what it looks like. When will you fine these clearly. You clearly haven't or this behavior would not continue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffit, 13th May
item.description:
Lewisham high street (Albacore crescent) Please remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewisham High Street, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Giant Hogweed growing by playground, 13th May
item.description:
This is growing in various places along the path right by the play ground

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lea Bridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 13th May
item.description:
Lewisham high street by entrance to shell garage Clear blocked drain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 357-361, Lewisham High Street, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black sack full of polystyrene and paint pots in Hayles Street near Hedger Street., 13th May
item.description:
For some reason I don’t seem able to attach photo. Never happened before!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Hayles Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
